content:
My expectations#In this post, I will write about my expectations for the elective course.
I hope to learn new ways of working with digital tools, reflections, and creative processes. I also want to develop my understanding through the 13 course sessions and document my progress along the way.
title: Expectations for the Elective Course

content: Topic#This is my first post.
title: Session 1

content:
About#This website is a collection of my assignments, reflections, and notes from my course.
It documents my learning process across 13 course sessions and shows how my ideas and understanding develop over time.
The purpose of this portfolio is to gather my written work in one place and present it in a clear and simple way.
title: About

content:
My Course Portfolio#Welcome to my course portfolio.
This website collects my assignments, reflections, and thoughts from 13 course sessions.
Here I will document what I learn, what I work on, and how my ideas develop throughout the course.
title: Home
